# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: false
        protocols:
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: false
        protocols:
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey

upstreams:
  - name: user-service-upstream
    targets:
      - target: user-service:8000
        weight: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3

  - name: order-service-upstream
    targets:
      - target: order-service:8000
        weight: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
      policy: local
